testcase.name: reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > returns paginated items and count
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > filters by statusFilter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > filters by userIdFilter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > filters by autoVerdictFilter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > applies dateRange filter
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > writes cross_account_query audit log
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > readonly_admin can call list
reviewDeepLearnRouter > list > handles empty results
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > returns full item with autoScanResult and metadata
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > returns userViolationCount from userViolationLog
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > returns archiveId when approved
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > returns textPreview from fileName
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > truncates textPreview for very long filenames
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > throws NOT_FOUND when item missing
reviewDeepLearnRouter > detail > readonly_admin can call detail
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > approves a pending item and creates deepLearningArchive
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > calls queue update twice: status + archiveId (atomic)
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > deepLearningArchive.create called exactly once (LD-A-5)
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > writes data_mutation/deep_learn_review_approve audit
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > throws already_processed when status is approved
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > throws already_processed when archiveId is set
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > throws NOT_FOUND when queue missing
reviewDeepLearnRouter > approve > readonly_admin approve → FORBIDDEN
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > rejects item and upserts userViolationLog count+1
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > writes data_mutation/deep_learn_review_reject audit
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > triggers security_alert when violation count >= 3
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > does NOT trigger alert when violation count < 3
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > throws already_rejected when status is rejected
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > throws already_processed when status is approved (AC-9)
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > throws NOT_FOUND when queue missing
reviewDeepLearnRouter > reject > readonly_admin reject → FORBIDDEN
reviewDeepLearnRouter > banUploader > super_admin: auto_executed + creates approvalRequest + suspends via updateMany
reviewDeepLearnRouter > banUploader > admin: pending + creates approvalRequest + no suspension
reviewDeepLearnRouter > banUploader > super_admin writes high_risk_action/ban_uploader audit
reviewDeepLearnRouter > banUploader > admin writes high_risk_action/approval_request_create audit
reviewDeepLearnRouter > banUploader > throws uploader_already_suspended when suspendedAt is set
reviewDeepLearnRouter > banUploader > readonly_admin banUploader → FORBIDDEN
reviewDeepLearnRouter > banUploader > approvalRequest created with correct riskLevel=high
reviewDeepLearnRouter > userViolations > returns violations for a specific userId
reviewDeepLearnRouter > userViolations > returns all high-count violations when userId is undefined
reviewDeepLearnRouter > userViolations > writes cross_account_query audit log
reviewDeepLearnRouter > userViolations > readonly_admin can call userViolations
reviewDeepLearnRouter > userViolations > returns empty when no violations found
